---
title: "\'Conversation on Books, A\'"
---

## \'Conversation on Books, A\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881-1890
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Articles in Journal

**Publisher:** MP

### Notes

This series of articles, consisting of a conversation about recent publications, ran frequently from January 1881 to June 1890.  By no means all the articles were written by CMY, for some are signed by others.  However, many are attributed to the Editor, and others include \'Arachne\' a character she assumed in dealings with the Spiders and who voices her opinions.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
